title: Exercise
description: A single practice exercise (flashcard) for the multiple choice app.

inputMode.description: Determines the input UI and validation logic.

instruction.description: Question text shown above the answer area. Supports Markdown.

images.description: Filenames of images in /data/img/ to display alongside the instruction.

answerOptions.description: List of answer options for SINGLE_CHOICE and MULTIPLE_CHOICE modes. Supports Markdown.

correct.description: The correct answer. Type depends on inputMode: number index for SINGLE_CHOICE, array of indices for MULTIPLE_CHOICE, string for TEXT, number for NUMBER.

caseSensitive.description: TEXT mode only. Whether the comparison is case-sensitive.

maximumStringDistance.description: TEXT mode only. Maximum Levenshtein distance to accept as correct. If omitted, auto-calculated from answer length (0 for ≤3 chars, 1 for 4–6, 2 for 7+).

explainInstruction.description: Explanation text shown after answering. Explains the correct answer in context. Supports Markdown.

matchOptions.description: Right-side items for MATCH mode. Each entry pairs with the corresponding index in answerOptions as defined by correct. Supports Markdown.

explainAnswerOptions.description: Per-option explanations, one per entry in answerOptions. Shown after answering to explain why each option is correct or incorrect. Supports Markdown.

adminComment.description: Internal note for exercise authors. Not displayed to users.

adminTags.description: Tags for categorization and filtering (e.g. topic, difficulty).

correct.description: Permutation array: correct[i] is the index into matchOptions that pairs with answerOptions[i].
